title: Security: Web sites can open privileged pages via remote debugging server (CSRF)
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
When Chrome is started with the --remote-debugging-port=PORT flag, an undocumented HTTP API becomes available at http://127.0.0.1:PORT/.  
One of the APIs is /json/new?(url_here), which is susceptible to cross-site request forgery. Attackers can use this from a web page
